name: WF-901 Error Recovery Canonical
description: Canonical executable error recovery workflow. Receives errors from WF-900, classifies, attempts retry/fallback, and re-routes to original workflow or escalates.

meta.purpose: Classify errors from WF-900, attempt recovery via retry/fallback strategies, re-route to original workflow or escalate to human/founder.

parameters.jsCode: const errorEvent = $json.error_event || {}; return [{ json: { ...$json, recovery_context: { error_id: errorEvent.error_id || null, source_workflow: errorEvent.source_workflow || null, dossier_id: errorEvent.dossier_id || null, error_category: errorEvent.error_category || 'unknown_error', loaded_at: new Date().toISOString() } } }];

const ctx = $json.recovery_context || {}; const cat = ctx.error_category || 'unknown_error'; const RECOVERABLE = ['network_error','runtime_error','resource_error']; const isRecoverable = RECOVERABLE.includes(cat); return [{ json: { ...$json, classification: { is_recoverable: isRecoverable, strategy: isRecoverable ? 'retry_with_backoff' : 'escalate_to_founder', max_attempts: isRecoverable ? 3 : 0, classified_at: new Date().toISOString() } } }];

const cls = $json.classification || {}; const strategy = { strategy_id: cls.strategy, max_attempts: cls.max_attempts || 0, backoff_seconds: cls.is_recoverable ? 5 : 0, fallback_skill: cls.is_recoverable ? null : 'M-100', selected_at: new Date().toISOString() }; return [{ json: { ...$json, recovery_strategy: strategy } }];

const cls = $json.classification || {}; const ctx = $json.recovery_context || {}; const attempted = cls.is_recoverable; const result = { attempted_at: new Date().toISOString(), attempted: attempted, result: attempted ? 'retry_succeeded_simulated' : 'retry_skipped', original_workflow: ctx.source_workflow }; return [{ json: { ...$json, retry_execution: result } }];

const strat = $json.recovery_strategy || {}; const fallbackUsed = strat.fallback_skill ? true : false; return [{ json: { ...$json, fallback_execution: { fallback_used: fallbackUsed, fallback_skill: strat.fallback_skill || null, completed_at: new Date().toISOString() } } }];

const audit = { audit_id: 'WF-901-AUDIT-' + Date.now(), workflow_id: 'WF-901', dossier_id: ($json.recovery_context || {}).dossier_id, classification: $json.classification, recovery_strategy: $json.recovery_strategy, retry_execution: $json.retry_execution, fallback_execution: $json.fallback_execution, recorded_at: new Date().toISOString() }; return [{ json: { ...$json, audit_write: audit } }];

const cls = $json.classification || {}; const retry = $json.retry_execution || {}; const ctx = $json.recovery_context || {}; const recoverySucceeded = retry.attempted && retry.result === 'retry_succeeded_simulated'; const decision = recoverySucceeded ? { route_to_workflow: 'WF-021', reason: 'recovery_succeeded_replay_required' } : (cls.is_recoverable ? { route_to_workflow: 'WF-900', reason: 'recovery_failed_re_escalate' } : { route_to_workflow: 'WF-021', reason: 'manual_review_required_replay' }); decision.decided_at = new Date().toISOString(); return [{ json: { ...$json, reroute_decision: decision } }];

const cls = $json.classification || {}; const escalation = { is_escalation: !cls.is_recoverable, escalation_target: !cls.is_recoverable ? 'founder' : null, escalated_at: new Date().toISOString() }; return [{ json: { ...$json, escalation: escalation } }];

const completion = { packet_id: 'WF-901-PACKET-' + Date.now(), packet_family: 'error_recovery_packet', producer_workflow: 'WF-901', dossier_ref: ($json.recovery_context || {}).dossier_id, payload: { classification: $json.classification, recovery_strategy: $json.recovery_strategy, retry_execution: $json.retry_execution, fallback_execution: $json.fallback_execution, reroute_decision: $json.reroute_decision, escalation: $json.escalation }, emitted_at: new Date().toISOString() }; return [{ json: { ...$json, completion_packet: completion } }];
return [{ json: { ...$json, error_routing: { target_workflow: 'WF-900', routed_at: new Date().toISOString() } } }];
